faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in Manhattanville homes?
faqs.answer: The most common pantry pests we treat in Manhattanville include Indian meal moths, confused flour beetles, sawtoothed grain beetles, and rice weevils. These pests typically enter homes through contaminated packaged foods and quickly spread throughout pantries and cabinets.

faqs.question: How much does pantry pest control cost in Manhattanville?
faqs.answer: Our pantry pest control services in Manhattanville range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of affected areas. This includes inspection, treatment, and follow-up recommendations to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How long does it take to eliminate a pantry pest infestation?
faqs.answer: Most pantry pest infestations can be eliminated within 1-2 weeks with proper treatment and sanitation. Our initial service includes thorough inspection and treatment, while complete resolution requires discarding infested products and maintaining proper food storage practices. We provide detailed guidance on preventive measures during our visit.

faqs.question: Are your pantry pest treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. Our treatments focus on targeted application, sanitation, and exclusion methods. We always advise on any necessary precautions and can schedule treatments at times convenient for your household.
